ANIME.label: Anime / Manga
ANIME.promptCues: High-quality cel-shaded anime, sharp lineart, vibrant manga colors, 2D aesthetic, Shonen style.
ANIME.uiVibe: Bold Manga lines with dynamic speed-line accents

GHIBLI.label: Ghibli-inspired
GHIBLI.promptCues: Studio Ghibli aesthetic, hand-painted watercolor textures, soft dreamy lighting, nostalgic cinematic atmosphere.
GHIBLI.uiVibe: Soft paper textures and dreamy nature motifs

PIXAR.label: Pixar / Disney 3D
PIXAR.promptCues: Disney-style 3D render, stylized proportions, expressive eyes, sub-surface scattering skin, cinematic 3D lighting.
PIXAR.uiVibe: Glowing 3D neon borders and polished glass effects
